title: Badgers geared for new season
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers are...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers are charging into the 2025/26 cricket season with renewed vigor, as preparations under new head coach Lotle Sesele hit full stride. With all players back from their overseas commitments, the Oudtshoorn-based side is poised for a competitive campaign, blending fresh leadership with a clear focus on success.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers are charging into the 2025/26 cricket season with renewed vigor, as preparations under new head coach Lotle Sesele hit full stride. With all players back from their overseas commitments, the Oudtshoorn-based side is poised for a competitive campaign, blending fresh leadership with a clear focus on success."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Badgers’ season will launch on October 2 with a four-day clash against the Limpopo Impala in Polokwane. They’ll return home to Oudtshoorn on October 16 to face the Mpumalanga Rhinos in another four-day encounter, before diving into the high-octane T20 Challenge later in the month."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sesele, who stepped into the head coach role this offseason, has confirmed Yaseen Valli as captain for red-ball cricket and George van Heerden as skipper for white-ball formats (50-over and T20).“We have full confidence in their leadership abilities,” Sesele said.","html":"Sesele, who stepped into the head coach role this offseason, has confirmed Yaseen Valli as captain for red-ball cricket and George van Heerden as skipper for white-ball formats (50-over and T20).
“We have full confidence in their leadership abilities,” Sesele said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“As a coaching staff, we trust that their dual roles will seamlessly align with our plans for a successful season.”The team, however, faces a challenge with the recent retirement of wicketkeeper-batsman Luke Beaufort, a former South Africa U19 star."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Beaufort has opted to pursue a corporate career in the UK, leaving a gap in the squad. Sesele assured fans that a replacement will be named soon, keeping the team’s momentum intact. With a blend of seasoned players, emerging talent, and a dynamic new coach, the Garden Route Badgers are setting their sights on a standout season. Fans will be watching closely as the team aims to make waves in both the four-day and T20 formats.","html":"Beaufort has opted to pursue a corporate career in the UK, leaving a gap in the squad. Sesele assured fans that a replacement will be named soon, keeping the team’s momentum intact. With a blend of seasoned players, emerging talent, and a dynamic new coach, the Garden Route Badgers are setting their sights on a standout season. Fans will be watching closely as the team aims to make waves in both the four-day and T20 formats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fixtures for the season are:Cricket South Africa Division 2 T20 Challenge","html":"The fixtures for the season are:
Cricket South Africa Division 2 T20 Challenge"},{"type":"list","items":["25 October vs Limpopo Impalas (Cricket Club Polokwane)","29 October vs Eastern Cape Iinyathi (Recreation Ground; Oudtshoorn)","2 November vs Northern Cape (Kimberley Oval; Kimberley)","8 November vs Mpumalanga Rhinos (Recreation Ground; Oudtshoorn)","12 November vs Eastern Storms (Recreation Ground; Oudtshoorn)","15 November vs Free State (Mangaung Oval)","18 Novemebr Division 2 T20 Challenge - Qualifier 1","19 November Division 2 T20 Challenge - Eliminator","21 November Division 2 T20 Challenge - Qualifier 2","23 November Division 2 T20 Challenge - Final"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cricket South Africa Four-Day Series: Division 2","html":"Cricket South Africa Four-Day Series: Division 2"},{"type":"list","items":["2-5 October 2025 vs Limpopo Impalas (Cricket Club Polokwane)","16-19 October 2025 vs Mpumalanga Rhinos (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","18-21 December 2025 vs Eastern Cape Iinyathi (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","8-11 January 2026 vs Northern Cape (Kimberley Oval, Kimberley)","15-18 January 2026 vs Free State (Mangaung Oval)","29 Jan - 1 Feb 2026 vs Eastern Storms (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","6-10 February 2026 FinalCricket South Africa One-day Domestic Competition 2026: Division 2","21 February vs Northern Cape (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","25 February vs Mpumalanga Rhinos (Uplands College, White River)","28 February vs Eastern Storm (Willowmore Park, Benoni)","5 March vs Free State (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","8 March vs Eastern Cape Iianyathi (Buffalo Park, East London)","11 March vs SA Emerging (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","15 March vs Limpopo Impalas (Recreation Ground, Oudtshoorn)","18 March - One Day Domestic Qualifier","22 March - One Day Domestic Final"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
